1._value: At the entrance of #m10001000#, I meet #p402#'s father, #p202#, the chief of Henesys. Before I can even start a conversation, he asks for #b15 #t4000013#s and 15 #t4000016#s#k.

2._value: Only after I brought the #t4000013#s and the #t4000019#s did #p202# start talking to me.

0._value: You want to talk to me? I'm the elder of this town—I don't have time to waste chatting with someone like you. If you really want a word with me, bring something needed for the town. Hunt #b25 #o13#s#k and #b25 #o16#s#k, and collect #b15 #t4000013#s#k and #b15 #t4000016#s#k. Maybe then I'll have a moment to spare.

Who are you? I don't think we've met.

#b#L0# I'm just a traveler. Don't mind me.#l
#L1# I'm here on #p402#'s behalf. Just give me five minutes.#l
#L2# Haha... isn't it beautiful today?#l

1._value:
#p402#? Ha, I no longer have a son with that name. Get out of here!

#b#L0# Ah... Yes, sir. Sorry for bothering you.#l
#L1# But #p402# wants to come home.#l
#L2# Cut it out! #p402# is sorry for running away!#l

2._value:
Eh? Confronting me now? Yelling at me in public? Hmm, you must be somebody important. Fine. How's #p402# doing?

#b#L0# #p402# is having a hard time since he ran away.#l
#L1# #p402# is getting sick of wandering around.#l
#L2# Why don't you ask #p402# yourself?#l

3._value:
Ask him myself? Hahahaha! I like you. That makes me wonder. What do YOU think of ME?

#b#L0# I think you are a great chief.#l
#b#L1# I think you are too harsh on Alex.#l
#b#L2# I think you hide the fact that you're actually a person of warmth.#l

4._value:
Yes, like you said, I'm the chief, but ever since #p402# left, I've been losing face!

#b#L0# #p402# knows he made poor decisions, but now he's asking for forgiveness. What he needs right now is a compassionate father.#l
#b#L1# Are you worried less about your son and more about your image in this town? You've got to be kidding me!#l
#b#L2# #p402#'s been unsettled since his mother passed away. Your strict nature hasn't helped him any. How about forgiving him?#l

5._value: You know THAT much? I suppose it's true that #p402# has been more rebellious since Anna passed away. I've been busy with my chiefly duties, and perhaps I've neglected him. Maybe this is my fault...\n\n#b#L0# If you truly believe that, you should try to reconcile with him.#l

6._value: Thank you. Thanks to you, I think I can finally clear up the misunderstanding with #p402#. Please tell him he’s welcome to return to the town. Of course, I’ll still be taking the materials I asked for earlier. Oh, and one more thing… this is #t4031006#, a keepsake of his mother—Anna. Please give it to him. He’ll understand what it means. Here, take it.

0._value: What do you think I am, a tourist attraction? Shame on you... and get out of my face.

2._value: Ah yes, such a beautiful day... or not! I have no time for idle chit chat. Scram!

0._value: What a chicken. You tell me you know #p402# and then want to flee when I get angry? I don't even want to speak to you. Get out of here.

1._value: He wants to come home? Hahaha...! That's a lie! I'm sure he's happy that he can do whatever he wants now, especially since he took my money.

0._value: He's having a hard time? Good! Please give him this message: #bStay away. Feel the pain. Experience the hard life! Then maybe you'll learn a thing or two about being independent.

1._value: Sick of it?! He wants to come home now that he's sick of living alone? Hahahahahahha! As of this moment, I know no #p402#! What an ungrateful... Argh.
You are brutally honest. I usually like honesty, but I don't appreciate your candor one bit right now. Are you trying to make me mad?

2._value: Hahaha! You're either very observant or you're a kiss-up. Either way, it doesn't matter. I'm busy. Scram.

0._value: You don't know #p402# like I do. What were you offered in return for helping #p402#? It doesn't matter, I can never forgive him. Please leave...

1._value: Maybe, maybe not! But I have responsibilities! I've served longer as chief of this town than you've been alive. Who are you to chastise ME?

0._value: You want to talk to me? I am an elder of this town, I don't have the time to sit around and chat with someone like you. If you really want to talk to me, bring me some materials to repair the town. I might be able to spare some time if you can hunt #b#e25#n #o13#s#k and #b#e25#n #o16#s#k, and bring me #b15 #t4000013#s#k and #b15 #t4000016#s#k...

You want to talk to me? I am an elder of this town, I don't have the time to sit around and chat with someone like you. If you really want to talk to me, bring me some materials to repair the town. I might be able to spare some time if you can hunt #b#e25#n #o13#s#k and #b#e25#n #o16#s#k, and bring me #b15 #t4000013#s#k and #b15 #t4000016#s#k...
